title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Coursera India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Coursera India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Coursera India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Curriculum Developer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Coursera India International Enterprises:
Coursera India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India International Enterprises!
